query: SELECT rc.id, rc.name, rc.streamUrl FROM radio_channels rc INNER JOIN (SELECT streamUrl FROM radio_channels WHERE status = 'active' GROUP BY streamUrl HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) dup ON rc.streamUrl = dup.streamUrl WHERE rc.status = 'active' ORDER BY rc.streamUrl, rc.id
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zpoeP3x1cmc7iMR.f2a79e44485f --database eSHiAmKDzW4pqcyH7Ttb7c --execute SELECT rc.id, rc.name, rc.streamUrl FROM radio_channels rc INNER JOIN (SELECT streamUrl FROM radio_channels WHERE status = 'active' GROUP BY streamUrl HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) dup ON rc.streamUrl = dup.streamUrl WHERE rc.status = 'active' ORDER BY rc.streamUrl, rc.id
